[[File:Skywalker_family2.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Luke, Mara, and [[Ben Skywalker]]]]
"'''Who's Who in the New Jedi Order'''" was an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]]. Written by [[Daniel Wallace]], it covered the members of the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|New Jedi Order series]], with small bios detailing their appearances in various ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Timeline of media|media]]. It also included a gallery depicting many never-seen-before [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], as illustrated by [[Dan Veesenmeyer]] and [[Russell Walks]].

==Contents==
*The [[Jedi Praxeum|Academy]]
*The [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Invasion]]

==Continuity==
This article listed Jacen, Jaina, and a number of Jedi trainees in the Jedi Knights section, although they were not formally promoted until later in the New Jedi Order.
